versions.version_description: A simpler version of White Horse played on Capo 4.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
| [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#sus2[/ch]  | [ch]C#m[/ch]  | [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#sus2[/ch]  | [ch]C#m[/ch]  | 2x

| [ch]C#m[/ch]  | [ch]C#m[/ch]  | [ch]C#m[/ch]  | [ch]C#m[/ch]  |


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
 This love[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]
 Is getting kinda dangerous[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]Badd9[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
 Feels like it's a loaded gun[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
 My mind,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
 It's turning like a cloud of dust[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]Badd9[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
 My heart always wants to run[/tab]


[tab][Chorus]
[ch]C#m[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]N.C.           [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If you want a cowboy on a white  horse[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Ridin' off into the sun---set[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If that's the kinda love you wanna wait  for[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
Hold on tight, girl, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]
No, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
No, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]
White horse[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
 Someday,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
 Maybe you could have your way[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]Badd9[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
 Right now's just not the time[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
 Some things[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
 A man's just got to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]Badd9[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
 I wish you could change my mind[/tab]


[tab][Chorus]
[ch]C#m[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]N.C.           [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If you want a cowboy on a white  horse[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Ridin' off into the sun---set[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If that's the kinda love you wanna wait  for[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
Hold on tight, girl, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]
No, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
No, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]
White horse[/tab]


[Instrumental Bridge] (double time)
| [ch]B[/ch]     | [ch]C#5[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]E[/ch]     | [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]    |
| [ch]B[/ch]     | [ch]C#5[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]E[/ch]     | [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If you want a cowboy on a white  horse[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Ridin' off into the sun---set[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If that's the kinda love you wanna wait  for[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Hold on tight, girl, I ain't there[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If you want a cowboy on a white  horse[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
Ridin' off into the sun---set[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]C#5[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
If that's the kinda love you wanna wait  for[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
Hold on tight, girl, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]
No, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
No, I ain't there yet[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]
White horse[/tab]


[Ending] (double time)
| [ch]B[/ch]     | [ch]C#5[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]E[/ch]     | [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]    |
[tab]| [ch]B[/ch]     | [ch]C#5[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]E[/ch]     | [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] |
                           (2/4)[/tab]
(normal time)
| [ch]B[/ch]     | [ch]B[/ch]     | [ch]C#m[/ch]
